hypothesis: Reminder nudges for frequently reordered organic products will increase repeat organic orders.
action: Send reorder reminders for high-reorder organic products.

target_segment: Organic loyal but not high-value users
hypothesis: Personalized organic recommendations will increase organic item share among warm users.
action: Recommend organic alternatives in pantry, snacks, frozen, beverages, and bakery.

hypothesis: Suggesting organic alternatives to products users already buy will increase organic penetration in low-share categories.
action: Show organic swap suggestions beside non-organic products.

target_segment: Organic loyal but not high-value users
hypothesis: Bundling trusted organic categories with adjacent categories will increase organic basket depth.
action: Create weekly bundles like Organic Fresh + Dairy + Pantry Basket.

target_segment: Organic loyal but not high-value users
hypothesis: A limited-time upgrade offer will convert loyal users into high-value organic buyers.
action: Offer discount or reward when user crosses 25% organic basket share.

hypothesis: A subscription/membership plan will increase retention and monetize already high-value users.
action: Offer recurring organic essentials pack or organic membership benefits.
